data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Microsoft.com utilizes a microservices architecture to allow scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed into small, independent services that communicate via APIs.

data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: The site is hosted on Azure, benefiting from high availability and robustness.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure App Services and Azure CDN for content delivery.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: A global CDN is used to deliver content quickly and efficiently to users worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Leverages Azure CDN for optimized latency and performance.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: The website is designed to provide seamless browsing across devices.
data.technical_spec: Employs CSS3 media queries and flexible layouts.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Implements load balancing to distribute traffic evenly across servers.
data.technical_spec: Uses Azure Load Balancer to ensure reliability and uptime.
